# Benjamin Eckstein

> Personal site of Benjamin Eckstein, freelance agentic engineer,
> Kleinmachnow near Berlin, Germany. One page, one word, three senses.

## Facts
- Name: Benjamin Eckstein
- Role: Agentic Engineer (freelance)
- Location: Kleinmachnow, Germany
- Degree: M.Sc. Computer Science
- Experience: 20+ years of software engineering
- Co-founder of KI-Syndikat; founder of CodeWithAgents
- First public GitHub commit: 2016-09-09,
  https://github.com/benjamineckstein/rep1/commit/03a21a1554db0459dffd6961be48939e1573fcc8
